chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Revision Application No.S- 118 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA 10299/2025. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on MA 10300/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 28.11.2025. Mr. Muhammad Zakria Baloch, Advocate for applicant. = Counsel for the applicant does not press this Criminal Revision Application which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed applications. JUDGE Tufail
